title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Adobe India Holdings Services:
Adobe India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India Holdings Services!
jsonLd.skills: TypeScript, TensorFlow, Agile/Scrum, JavaScript, Node.js, React, REST APIs, Python
